title: Market Research Analyst
description: Support Costco's business strategy through market research and consumer insights analysis.
responsibilities: Conduct quantitative and qualitative market research studies
Analyze consumer behavior trends and competitive positioning
Prepare market research reports and data visualizations
Support product development teams with consumer insights
Manage research projects and vendor relationships
Monitor industry trends and market developments

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
